claims.summary: `structural_integrity_index` should remain visible as a read-only distinction between held structure and hollow or stuck density.
claims.rationale: Verified the existing structural transparency/integrity companion test and added Minime-side `structural_integrity` and `structural_strain_gap` in the viscosity vector.

claims.summary: Porosity and viscosity stress should distinguish navigable heavy flow from sludge risk without changing pressure/fill/PI control.
claims.rationale: Verified the viscosity/porosity transport cluster, including bridge surfacing without control.

claims.summary: Changing `RESONANCE_STABILITY_FOOTHOLD_WEIGHT` from 0.45 to 0.40 would retune live habitability semantics.
claims.rationale: Explicit authority gate: foothold-weight tuning is not applied without Mike/operator approval and a separate test/deploy plan.
